data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding rate limiting on public pages. However, the evidence does not provide any direct confirmation of the scenario being executed or the expected results being captured. The linked use case and prior steps do not address the specific requirement of validating the rate limiting behavior, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the execution of the persona scenario regarding rate limiting.
